title: GENERAL LEGAL AID - 211info
text: OREGON LAW CENTER LANE COUNTY LEGAL AID GENERAL LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general legal counseling and/or representation for low-income individuals who need assistance with routine legal matters (civil, non-criminal), usually regarding housing, public benefits, family, or elder law. Some locations may offer additional services. 101 E Broadway Suite 200 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Low-income individuals who are at or below 125% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL). Exceptions for domestic violence emergencies. Hours: Office hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-11:45am and 12:45pm-5pm Intake for new clients: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 1pm-3pm (541) 485-1017 100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 485-1017 Main phone Reception (541) 485-1017 ext 100 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and/or intake. Applicants are interviewed by a volunteer intake worker. Intake supervisor determines eligibility and program's ability to assist further. Referrals made to other community resources, as needed. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Comprehensive Family Law Services Elder Law Eviction Prevention Assistance General Legal Aid Protective/Restraining Orders Tenant Rights Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - SENIOR LAW SERVICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LAW CENTER LANE COUNTY LEGAL AID
